definitions.description: Use NVIDIA NeMo Retriever embedding models from build.nvidia.com or a self-hosted NIM

properties.displayName: This node must be connected to a vector store. Insert one
properties.name: notice
model
properties.description: The NeMo Retriever embedding model. Choose from the list, or specify an ID for a self-hosted NIM. input_type is set automatically (passage when indexing, query when searching). Learn more.

options.name: batchSize
options.description: Maximum number of documents to send in each request

options.name: stripNewLines
options.description: Whether to strip new lines from the input text

options.name: dimensions
options.description: The number of dimensions the resulting output embeddings should have. Only supported by models with dynamic (Matryoshka) embeddings; leave unset to use the model default.

options.name: timeout
options.description: Maximum amount of time a request is allowed to take in seconds. Set to -1 for no timeout.

definitions.name: @n8n/n8n-nodes-langchain.embeddingsNvidia
